---
title: "Notebooks"
description: |
  Notebooks made with quarto + R code. I aim to use these notebooks as drafts to share with scientific collaborators or students.
---

::: {.lang-switch}
🌐 **English** · [Italiano](index_notebooks.it.qmd) · [Español](index_notebooks.es.qmd) · [Português](index_notebooks.pt.qmd) · [Français](index_notebooks.fr.qmd) · [Deutsch](index_notebooks.de.qmd)
:::
